Important Policy Update: Data Handling Procedures
Effective March 1, 2026, all departments must follow updated data handling
                procedures for personally identifiable information (PII). This includes new
                requirements for encryption at rest and in transit.
Key changes: 1) All PII must be encrypted using AES-256. 2) Data retention

ypted using AES-256. 2) Data retention
                period reduced from 7 years to 3 years. 3) Access logs must be reviewed monthly.
Non-compliance may result in disciplinary action. Contact the Data Protection
                Officer at dpo@company.com for questions.
